query: How long does it take to get my book published?
ideal_answer: Publishing standard timelines range from 45 to 60 days following the submission of the final manuscript.

query: Can we speed up the publishing process?
ideal_answer: Expedited tracks are available to shorten the timeline if the queue permits and all assets are ready.

query: How do I know when my book is live?
ideal_answer: A book is live when it appears on its assigned retail and distribution channels. You will receive first live links via email.

query: My release date has passed and I don't see my book on stores. What should I check?
ideal_answer: Verify metadata sync status, retailer propagation delay, and complete any remaining checklist items.

query: When are royalties calculated?
ideal_answer: Royalties are calculated quarterly in January, April, July, and October.

query: How long does it take to get paid my royalties after a quarter closes?
ideal_answer: Royalty payments are processed within 60 days of the close of each quarter.

query: Why would my royalty payment be placed on hold?
ideal_answer: Common causes of royalty holds include incomplete bank information, compliance audits, or disputed calculations.

query: What are the possible royalty status values?
ideal_answer: Royalty statuses include pending, processing, paid, and on_hold.

query: How do I log into the author workspace?
ideal_answer: Use the onboarding link sent during setup along with your registered email address.

query: I cannot sign into my author profile dashboard. What should I do first?
ideal_answer: Reset your password and check that the email matches the registered address on your profile.

query: Who should I email if my author workspace login still fails after resetting password?
ideal_answer: Contact support at ops@centaurus.dev with your email address and book title.

query: What is included in the Launch Sprint program?
ideal_answer: The Launch Sprint covers category positioning, launch coordination, and marketplace visibility support during the release window.

query: What does the Media Relay service cover?
ideal_answer: Media Relay provides press outreach, publicity asset packaging, and post-launch communication support.

query: Can you explain what the Awards Circuit service program does?
ideal_answer: Awards Circuit assists in coordinating submissions to selected literary prizes based on genre and eligibility.

query: How long does it take to ship physical author copies after my book goes live?
ideal_answer: Physical author copies are dispatched within 7 to 10 business days of the book release.

query: Where do I find tracking details for my author copies?
ideal_answer: Tracking numbers are sent to your registered email address after the shipment is booked.

query: It has been over a month and my author copies haven't arrived. What's next?
ideal_answer: If copies haven't arrived within 30 days of dispatch, verify the address and courier status.

query: How frequently is sales reporting data updated?
ideal_answer: Sales data updates on a rolling basis but might lag behind real-time store events.

query: When will I get my monthly sales report?
ideal_answer: Consolidated monthly sales reports are normally emailed during the first week of the month.

query: Are the sales numbers shown in the platform real-time?
ideal_answer: Some numbers are near-real-time platform estimates, while others are settled reporting figures.

query: When should we escalate a support ticket to human operators?
ideal_answer: Escalate to human review if identity is unclear, payment safety is at risk, or system evidence is weak.

query: Does the system guess when it's not sure of the answer?
ideal_answer: No, the platform is designed to prefer safe escalation over speculative answers.

query: What is the timeline for book launch?
ideal_answer: The standard timeline is 45 to 60 days from manuscript submission.

query: How do I get help with my login details for my book portal?
ideal_answer: Try password reset first, then verify the email matches. If it fails, write to ops@centaurus.dev.

query: Tell me about the promotional programs available for books.
ideal_answer: Available programs include Launch Sprint, Media Relay, and Awards Circuit.
